review_summary.allowed_conclusion: COLO829 is an independent tumor-normal and driver-recovery guardrail. It does not establish HRD status until full SV/CNA/signature evidence is generated and benchmarked.

evidence.detail: COLO829 Illumina HiSeq X tumor has BRAF V600E ALT fraction 0.670968 while normal ALT fraction is 0.0.
COLO829 PacBio Sequel tumor has BRAF V600E ALT fraction 0.568182 while normal ALT fraction is 0.018868.
COLO829 Oxford Nanopore MinION tumor has BRAF V600E ALT fraction 0.610169 while normal ALT fraction is 0.04.
COLO829 Illumina NovaSeq phased tumor has BRAF V600E ALT fraction 0.753846 while normal ALT fraction is 0.0.
COLO829 SV/CNA truth assets are present but no build-matched Diana SV/CNA callset exists.
COLO829 SV/CNA truth assets are present, but no SV/CNA caller output or reciprocal-overlap result was generated.
COLO829 purity illumina metadata exposes 5 runs across levels 10, 20, 25, 50, 75 but submitted BAM indexes are missing for remote slicing.
COLO829 purity long_read metadata exposes 10 runs across levels 10, 20, 25, 50, 75 but submitted BAM indexes are missing for remote slicing.
COLO829 dilution BAMs are public but cannot be remotely region-sliced because ENA does not expose submitted BAI files for selected levels.

adapters.blocker: BRAF V600E pileup recovery is confirmed across available platforms.
adapters.next_action: Use as a tumor-normal handling guardrail only.

adapters.blocker: No build-matched Diana SV/CNA callset exists.
adapters.next_action: Fetch or generate build-matched COLO829 calls and run reciprocal overlap.

adapters.blocker: Selected purity BAMs require full transfer or local indexing before monotonic recall can be tested.
adapters.next_action: Transfer selected dilution BAM/FASTQ inputs and index locally before running purity recall.

adapters.blocker: Driver recovery does not establish HRD status.
adapters.next_action: Run full SV/CNA/signature evidence before any HRD interpretation.

blockers: COLO829 submitted BAMs and fetched hg38-lifted truth still require build reconciliation.
COLO829 submitted BAMs are GRCh37-style while the fetched SV truth VCF is hg38-lifted.
Selected purity BAMs require full transfer or local indexing before monotonic recall can be tested.
